---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TypeLate
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. For example: "I find it frustrating when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Use Case

Describe how this feature would fit into your workflow. Who would benefit from it and in what scenarios?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references that help illustrate the request.
